title: Oatcrisp Bites
description: These buttery, crispy bites are a diabetic-friendly treat perfect for weeknight snacking.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup pure maple syrup
ingredients.notes: natural sweetener, optional for a less sweet version

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine rolled oats and butter. Mix until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Stir in maple syrup and salt gently to ensure it's evenly distributed.
Using your hands or a spoon, shape the oat mixture into small balls about the size of a walnut. Place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
